title: Straw Golem Updated
description: This mod adds a helpful (and awfully cute) little golem to do some of your farming for you.
body:
Hello! This mod is no longer a port of Straw Golem Rebaled, but rather me taking the mod its own direction!
I've rewritten the mod, and hope to flesh it out in a new and different direction! This will only be true for 1.21+, as older versions will remain my port. The status below will display what how far my rewrite has gotten.

~~**I'm currently doing a poll to see what you all would like to see from the mod in the future. Please respond as it will give both of us a better mod to play!**~~

Thank you for the responses to the poll! Here's what I plan to change in the next update:

*   Adding Straw Golem Lifespan
    *   Even Straw Golems get sick if left alone!
    *   Golems will need upkeep to not decay with time 
    *   Will also add a config to customize this, for those preferring immortal Straw Golems
*   Adding Straw Golem Hunger
    *   Feed your Straw Golems, friends deserve food!
    *   Straw Golems will start to slow down if they are not fed.
    *   (See previous)
*   Adding Straw Golem Interactions
    *   Protect your Straw Golems!
    *   Animals eating the straw golems
    *   Pillagers attacking them
    *   Shivering in rain

1.21+ status: Beta Testing
Last Update: 2.1.1 Winter Update + Item Pick Update
![Image of winter version of Straw Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00886b56b4cbc1f210232762d404235b0f3700ce.png)

Please let me know what you all think about the winter model, and if there's any issues!


<details>
<summary>Hint</summary>
Note: Winter skin only available during December and January
Try throwing a snowball at a Straw golem!


</details>


Know Bugs:

- Straw golems cannot properly harvest sweet berries.
- Barrels not properly protecting straw golems.

Planned Features:

- More sounds when doing actions.
- Whitelist feature for picking up items.
- Straw golems harvesting non-standard crops (ex: sugar cane).

Mod before 1.21 info

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This mod is an unofficial port of [Straw Golem Rebaled](https://modrinth.com/mod/straw-golem) as with my other port of [Haybale](https://modrinth.com/mod/haybale-ported). I'm porting this and uploading this mod because a friend wanted to play it. If CommodoreThrawn would like to use this port officially or wants this port taken down, feel free to message me and I will do so.

Features (mostly taken from original): 

Harvesting
- Automatic harvesting, replanting of crops & delivery to a nearby container
- Can specify which container to deliver by shift right clicking golem and then container with an empty hand
- Supports modded crops and containers, stem grown blocks like pumpkins and melons, and more!
- Can add a whitelist / blacklist in config
  
Lifespan
- Golems have a 7 day lifespan by default. This is configurable
- Certain actions, like carrying a heavy block, being in water or the rain add an additional -1/tick penalty each (cumulative)
- Lifespan can be restored with wheat. 1 wheat = 1/4 minecraft day
- Strawgolem health is capped by their lifespan %. A golem with 3.5 days remaining will have a max health of 1 heart
- Lifespan is indicated via HWYLA or by their decaying texture. When they're very old there's a fly that hovers around 'em
  
Hunger
- Loves apples! They will follow you if you hold one
- Golems get hungry in 3 days by default. This is configurable
- If they don't get an apple in time, they will pout and refuse to work until you give them one!
- Each apple gives them another day before they're hungry again
Miscellaneous
- Iron Golems get curious sometimes, and will pick straw golems up for inspection
- Farm animals get hungry sometimes, and will take a little monch. Don't let their health get too low!
- Raiders seem to really have it out for straw golems. Make sure to protect them!

Configuration
- I've always tried to make the mod pretty configurable so modpack makers can have their way with it.
- Crops can be whitelist or blacklist, harvesting, replanting and delivery can all be toggled
- Crop detection range can be edited
- Lifespan and hunger defaults can be changed, or disabled alltogether. Lifespan penalties can also be toggled individually
- Tether system can be toggled and altered
- Golems picking up items from the ground can be toggled
- Golem pick up items can use whitelist, blacklist, or presets
- Misc features like shivering, iron golem pickup can be toggled as well

WIP Section:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Fix golem straw hat visibility in JEI
</details>


</details>
